title: CAMRI Cake Forks - Mini Fork for Dessert, Pastry, Fruit & Salad, Stainless Steel Small Forks Pack of 6, 5.3 Inch, Cutlery Starter for Home Kitchen & Restaurant (C62 – Set of 6)
features: Stainless Steel Construction: Our pastry forks set of 6 are made using only food-grade stainless steel that’s rust and corrosion resistant with a smooth mirror finish to offer just the right balance of quality, elegance, and durability for daily use.

A Touch Of Elegance: Each pack comes with a set of 6 heavy-duty dessert forks that are dimensionally stable and designed with close attention to even the smallest details so you can enjoy cakes, pastries, salads, fruits, and everyday meals in style.

Suitable For Any Occasion: Whether you’re setting up the table for dinner or planning a party, our dessert and dinner fork set has you covered. The dessert forks set of 6 provide just the right fit for catering, home dinners, picnics, weddings, buffets, holiday parties, and more.

Easy To Clean And Maintain: Each dessert fork is made to handle daily use while being a breeze to clean. They are dishwasher safe and hand washable to save you time and effort. Our pretty cake forks maintain their elegant charm even in the long run.

Make It A Gift: Besides being the perfect addition to your home kitchen, our forks for fruits, salads, and cakes also make a thoughtful gift for anyone. This dinner fork set makes a delightful gift for Housewarming, Birthdays, Valentine’s Day, Anniversaries, etc.
description: Product Description Strong, Elegant & Versatile – Just The Right Forks For Any Table Whether you’re looking for a dessert fork that’s suitable for everyday use or just want to impress guests at a party, CAMRI stainless steel dessert fork set has you covered. We combine quality stainless steel with precision and a perfectly balanced design to bring you heavy-duty forks that are elegant, comfortable to hold, and made to last. We use a classic pastry fork design with a touch of modern beauty to create an eye-catching combination that will elevate the look of any table no matter the setting. CAMRI cake forks set of 6 are suitable for both casual and formal occasions or just for day-to-day use so you and your guests can enjoy desserts in style. Classy & Functional To Complement Any Occasion Each fork is made using stainless steel and comfortable to hold handles so you can eat salads, pastries, fruits, etc. without worrying about any bending.They are heavy-duty, clean up quickly and provide just the right fit for everyday use making them the ideal choice for any home, party, café, restaurant, wedding cutlery, catering service, and more. Solid steel construction to resist bending or breaking Designed to fit comfortably in your hands Makes the perfect gift for friends and family on any occasion Made without using any harsh materials or BPA Dishwasher safe and easy to maintain for long term use Weight & Lenght of Each Fork Model C62 : 24 Grams / Lenght: 6.4 Inches ( long Handle ) Model C37: 26 Grams / Lenght: 5.3 Inches Model C61: 15 Grams / Lenght: 5.3 Inches Model C4: 24 Grams / Lenght: 5.4 Inches Key Features of Dessert Forks set Made For Daily Use We don’t cut corners when it comes to quality which is why we only use a 100% Stainless Steel Construction with a smooth finish that’s resistant to rust and corrosion. Elevate Table Decor Thanks to the sleek build and mirror-polished finish, the dessert forks add a sophisticated and classy touch to the look of any dinner table to impress both family and guests. Concise & Balanced The cake forks are made with comfort and convenience in mind. They are carefully balanced with comfortable handles so you can enjoy desserts the right way. Quick Cleanups Each stainless steel fork is dishwasher safe and resistant to staining so you can use them with peace of mind with any desserts you love while maintaining their elegant charm.
